name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Backend engineer who has operated critical transaction flows for customer-facing products with a focus on API design, data integrity, operational automation, and incident response. I work best where product teams need durable service foundations that let feature delivery and production reliability improve together.

bullets: Designed and operated order, settlement, and partner integration APIs that reduced bottlenecks and failure modes in core transaction flows.
Tightened monitoring, alert routing, and runbook quality to shorten incident response time and lower manual coordination during service outages.
Improved schema design and query paths on payment and order services so data consistency and response performance could hold under higher load.
Built internal workflow services and admin tools used by operations and customer success teams to reduce repetitive coordination work.
Introduced queue-based retry policies and asynchronous processing for external integrations, which simplified recovery from transient failures.

projects.name: Partner Sync Platform
projects.subtitle: Integration and reconciliation tooling
bullets: Implemented a partner data synchronization service with retryable ingestion flows and reconciliation reporting.
Added audit trails and operator controls so partner incidents could be recovered with less manual investigation.
